fix_diff:
diff --git a/evolution_signal_collector.py b/evolution_signal_collector.py
+from modstore_server.self_maintenance_policy import load_loop_memory
+def _collect_loop_memory_signals(...):
+    memory = load_loop_memory()
+    emit last_policy_decision, open_items, recent risky runs
+    preserve created_at/completed_at timestamps in formatted prompt
+
 collect_evolution_signals(...):
+    loop_memory_items = _collect_loop_memory_signals()
+    total_count += len(loop_memory_items)
root_cause: The collector did not read the real self-maintenance loop memory file by default, so prior review_or_qa_reported_risk and failed_steps were invisible to digest/vibe prompts.
symptom: evolution_signal_collector loop memory support is ineffective because digest_vibe_prep calls collect_evolution_signals() without injecting memory
